creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=c6730766301df328d64ded996bacc0c9d27e5573

commit c6730766301df328d64ded996bacc0c9d27e5573
Author:     Gleb Popov <arrowd@FreeBSD.org>
AuthorDate: 2024-01-24 15:17:46 +0000
Commit:     Gleb Popov <arrowd@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2024-01-24 15:20:34 +0000

    Revert "devel/appstream{,-qt,-compose}: Combine into a single port with SUBPACKAGES."

    The current subpackages implementation does not support USES.<subpackage>, which
    causes a lot of extra dependencies to be added to the main subpackage.

    This reverts commit f292ea6fb5fc10359f130a4e25a3b60ab0df7c6e.

    PR:             276584
